title: Happy 3rd Birthday Assorted Colors Latex Balloons (22cm) Pack of 10 - Festive & Fun Party Decorations
features: CELEBRATE IN STYLE: Make your child's 3rd birthday extra special with our eye-catching happy 3rd birthday assorted colors latex balloons, perfect for an unforgettable and joyful celebration.

VIBRANT ASSORTED COLORS: Each pack contains 10 colorful latex balloons in a mix of lively shades, adding a pop of excitement to your party decorations and creating a fun atmosphere that will wow your little partygoers.

HIGH-QUALITY LATEX MATERIAL: Made from durable and eco-friendly latex, our balloons are designed to last throughout the entire celebration, providing you with peace of mind and ensuring a safe, fun-filled party experience.
PERFECT SIZE: At 22cm in diameter, these balloons offer the ideal size to fill your party venue without being overwhelming, easily transforming your space into a festive and lively birthday haven.

EFFORTLESS PARTY DECORATING: Our happy 3rd birthday assorted colors latex balloons come in a convenient pack of 10, making it simple to create a vibrant and cohesive look for your celebration with minimal effort on your part.
description: Product Description Create a charming atmosphere for your little one's big day with these Latex Happy 3rd Birthday Balloons. Supplied in an assortment of bold colours, these party balloons are a quick way to add bursts of colour to your child's third birthday party. With "Happy 3rd Birthday" lettering printed on one side, these balloons are designed to be filled with air and hung from the ceiling to ensure the printed text is right-side up. Whether they're placed individually throughout the room or bunched together in balloon bouquets, these latex balloons will be a cheerful addition to the celebration. Box Contains Happy 3rd Birthday Balloons 10 Pieces
